response.justification: While the candidate has broad engineering experience across many languages and domains, there is minimal evidence of deep JVM, Spring, or enterprise IDE tooling expertise — key requirements for this role. Java appears only as a minor skill among many, with no demonstrated ownership of IDE subsystems, language tooling, or enterprise framework integration work.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across multiple languages and platforms
Active open-source contributions and technical workshop leadership
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems in diverse environments
concerns: Lack of demonstrated deep expertise in Java/Kotlin JVM internals or enterprise frameworks like Spring
No visible experience with IDE architecture, language servers, or developer tooling at scale
Java appears as a minor skill among 10+ languages, with no project ownership or depth shown
